sources.existing_project_coverage: existing_exact: scripts/update_news.py has built-in OpenAI News RSS and feeds/follow.example.opml also lists the same official feed.
sources.verification_notes: The public RSS feed is valid and column-matching. The official page returned 403 to the scripted client, so page access should not be used as the primary access path.

sources.name: Anthropic Newsroom
sources.existing_project_coverage: existing_exact: scripts/update_news.py has an Anthropic newsroom page adapter for the same URL.
sources.verification_notes: The page is accessible, but no RSS/Atom rel alternate declaration or public feed link was found in the page HTML during this batch.

sources.name: Google Cloud AI & Machine Learning Blog
sources.existing_project_coverage: existing_partial: the original project covers Google DeepMind and Google AI Blog, but not this Google Cloud product blog URL.
sources.verification_notes: The official page is accessible, but no RSS/Atom rel alternate declaration or public feed link was found in the page HTML during this batch.

sources.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot Release Notes
sources.existing_project_coverage: existing_partial: feeds/follow.example.opml contains a broad Microsoft AI News feed, not Microsoft 365 Copilot release notes.
sources.verification_notes: The release-notes page is accessible, but no page-declared RSS/Atom feed was found. The existing Microsoft AI feed is valid but broad and not a release-notes feed.

sources.existing_project_coverage: existing_partial: feeds/follow.example.opml has the broad InfoQ CN feed, while the candidate is the AI topic page.
sources.verification_notes: The existing InfoQ feed is valid and public, but it is a broad site feed rather than a verified /topic/AI feed. Do not add the topic page separately before overlap review.

sources.name: DeepSeek API News
sources.existing_project_coverage: existing_partial: the original project has DeepSeek keyword coverage in discussion and relevance paths, but no official DeepSeek API news source.
sources.verification_notes: The original candidate URL https://api-docs.deepseek.com/news returned 404. The official API documentation homepage is public, and its stable Change Log entry is https://api-docs.deepseek.com/updates. No RSS or Atom feed declaration was found on the updates page, so the recommended access path is webpage monitoring.
